items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures climb after Dow's record-setting rally
items.description: US stock futures were steady Monday night as investors took time to settle following a record close for the Dow Jones.

items.title: Nvidia accelerates AI roadmap: Rubin superchip in full production, 5x faster
items.description: Investing.com -- NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is accelerating its release cycle, announcing at the CES 2026 convention on Monday that its highly anticipated Rubin data center products are in full production and nearing release this year.

items.title: Microsoft’s Nadella wants us to stop thinking of AI as ‘slop’
items.description: Nadella wants us to think of AI as a human helper instead of a slop-generating job killer. New data for 2026 indicates he could be right.

items.title: Nvidia launches Vera Rubin, its next major AI platform, at CES 2026
items.description: Nvidia launched its latest Vera Rubin superchip at CES 2026 on Monday.

items.title: Stock Market Today, Jan. 5: Dow Hits Record High on Energy Stocks Rally After Venezuela Developments
items.description: Today, Jan. 5, 2026, energy giants and banks are steering Wall Street higher as traders frame Venezuela's turmoil as an investment opening.
